parameters.query: SELECT workflow_id, workflow_name, MAX(completed_at) as last_run, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure' AND started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as failures_24h FROM web_intel.collection_log WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY workflow_id, workflow_name

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM web_intel.daily_traffic WHERE collected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 1) as traffic_data, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM web_intel.daily_rankings WHERE collected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 1) as ranking_data, (SELECT MAX(collected_date) FROM web_intel.daily_traffic) as last_traffic_date, (SELECT MAX(collected_date) FROM web_intel.daily_rankings) as last_ranking_date
